headline: Officials Detain Three Individuals in Taiwan Chip Smuggling Case
summary: The detention of individuals in Taiwan for forging export documents to smuggle Super Micro AI servers containing Nvidia chips to China, Hong Kong, and Macau. Tickers: SMCI, NVDA.

headline: Jensen Huang Has a Key Message for Super Micro Computer: It’s Time to ‘Enhance and Improve’ Regulation
summary: As regulatory scrutiny intensifies around Super Micro, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is urging the company to “enhance and improve” its compliance practices.
